ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "memid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "membership_plan" TEXT /* Membership plan assigned to the member (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the gym */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the member's membership expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (e.g., active, suspended, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "fac_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility (e.g., basketball court, swimming pool) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the facility */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the facility */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facid")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "bookid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the booking */,
  "facid" INTEGER /* ID of the facility booked */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "slots" INTEGER /* Number of slots booked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled, no-show) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_facid FOREIGN KEY ("facid") REFERENCES facilities ("facid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_memid FOREIGN KEY ("memid") REFERENCES members ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "paymentid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paymentid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_memid FOREIGN KEY ("memid") REFERENCES members ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_plans" (
  "planid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the plan (e.g., 1 month, 1 year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planid")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities_schedules" (
  "facid" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the facility on the specified day */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the facility on the specified day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facid", "day")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_booked_slots" (
  "bookid" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "facid" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "slots" INTEGER /* Number of slots booked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the slot was booked */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the slot details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_booked_slots_facid FOREIGN KEY ("facid") REFERENCES facilities ("facid")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_payments" (
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "paymentid" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the membership payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership payment details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memid", "paymentid")
)
